narrative:
Fremont City 4-A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 628 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
